brief: Yemen's Houthis attacked a Saudi tanker, pushing oil past $100; lawmakers propose an AI 'kill switch'; US-Saudi nuclear deal tied to Israel recognition; floods in West Virginia and wildfires in France.
news_summary: Houthi attacks on Saudi tankers and US-Iran tensions drive oil above $100; a bill requiring AI companies to implement kill switches is proposed; US-Saudi nuclear deal conditions on Saudi recognition of Israel; nearly 500 National Guard deployed for West Virginia floods.

en.brief: Yemen's Houthis attacked a Saudi tanker, pushing oil past $100; lawmakers propose an AI 'kill switch'; US-Saudi nuclear deal tied to Israel recognition; floods in West Virginia and wildfires in France.
en.news_summary: Houthi attacks on Saudi tankers and US-Iran tensions drive oil above $100; a bill requiring AI companies to implement kill switches is proposed; US-Saudi nuclear deal conditions on Saudi recognition of Israel; nearly 500 National Guard deployed for West Virginia floods.

zh.brief: 今日要闻：香港民主派人士胡志伟在英机场被扣留后获准入境；台湾收紧陆配参选资格；中国电影《澎湖海战》因触及歷史敏感题材撤档；美国与沙特签署核协议，条件为沙特承认以色列；英国女子在香港遭强姦后反被判刑；TikTok直播带货在英国兴起；华语电影金牌制片施南生逝世。
zh.news_summary: 香港民主派人士胡志伟在伦敦希斯罗机场被扣留后获准入境；台湾新规将陆配参选资格从「设籍满十年」改为「除籍满十年」，引发争议；中国电影《澎湖海战》撤档，因触及「反清复明」敏感历史；美国与沙特签署核协议，要求沙特承认以色列；英国女子伊莎贝尔·罗斯在香港控告强姦不成反被判勒索罪成；TikTok直播带货在英国快速增长；华语电影知名制片人施南生病逝。

todays_image.caption: The branching, creeping spread of Lobophora sp. mirrors the widening conflict as Houthi attacks and US strikes entangle the region's waters.
todays_image.title: Lobophora sp.
